description: CompositionBlack sleeveless pleated blouson tunic top made of 100% rayon, has contoured pleats that are created by attaching a contoured panel to the neckline, and an elasticated hemFittingSlimWash carePreferably dry clean, or hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentUse mild detergentFlat dryIron on reverse Anita Dongre has been there and done that. AND, her brand, brings to you one of the most breathtaking tunic tops, which you can conveniently wear to parties and night outs. Made of soft rayon and twisted silhouettes, this top looks great when paired with slacks and wedges.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in tunic topsHeight-5'7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
